reasoning_model_1: The audio accurately produces the text 'When I was young, we often helped in the fields.' (0:00-0:06). model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. Model 1 successfully modifies the voice to sound elderly, utilizing appropriate pacing and vocal texture (raspiness/depth) to fit the 'Age' constraint.
